title: Ukraine war briefing: Putin escalating war, not seeking an end - Merz
description: Condemnation after Kyiv bears brunt of massive Russian attack wave; warning over military drones too close to Ukrainian nuclear plants. What we know on day 1,542
content: “Kyiv and its partners are ready for negotiations aimed at a just peace,” said Merz, the German chancellor. “Russia, for its part, is continuing the war.” While Ukraine and Europe “want to help end this terrible war as quickly as possible”, the Russi... [3171 chars]

title: US PGA Championship 2026: Scottie Scheffler shares lead as Aronimink bites back on day one
description: As many of the world's best struggle at the US PGA Championship, Scottie Scheffler - the world's very best - is among a select few to get change out of Aronimink.
content:
Going into this week's US PGA Championship, there was a fascination with how Aronimink would play and what challenge it would present.
There was a strong feeling the Pennsylvania course might be ripe for being tamed.
Instead of having its belly tickl... [5773 chars]

title: Brutal raid on woman's birthday party highlights rise of Russian vigilante group
description:
The Russkaya Obshina group stages raids to look for activities contravening
"traditional Russian values".
content:
Warning: Offensive language
Katya was about to blow out the candles on her 30th birthday cake when masked men burst into the nightclub hired for her party, and began physically and verbally attacking her friends.

title: Hundreds of comedians unpaid by one of UK's biggest comedy festivals
description: Leicester Comedy Festival says it is committed to paying comedians but waiting on money themselves.
content:
Hundreds of comedians have been unpaid by one of the biggest comedy festivals in the UK.
Leicester Comedy Festival attracted about 100,000 spectators and more than 500 acts this year, including Sir Stephen Fry, Sara Pascoe and Rosie Holt, many of who... [5801 chars]

title: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
description: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
content:
It can take a decade of hard work to bring a new orchid to market.
While the rewards can be significant - the global orchid market is worth hundreds of millions of dollars - the competition to produce the next gorgeous flower is intense.
